items.title: Google DeepMind Blog
items.author: deepmind.google
items.snippet: In April 2026, Google AI and Google DeepMind have been active on X (Twitter) with several major announcements. Key highlights include the launch of Gemma 4, Google's latest family of open models optimized for on-device and edge deployments, with agentic capabilities powered by the new AICore Developer Preview. Google DeepMind also rolled out Gemini Robotics-ER 1.6, an upgrade giving robots significantly better visual and spatial understanding for real-world task planning, and announced a researc

items.title: Defining AI workflows | Genkit
items.author: firebase.google.com
items.snippet: Genkit is an open-source AI framework built and maintained by Google, available for JavaScript/TypeScript, Go, and Python (alpha). It provides a unified, code-centric API for building production-ready AI-powered applications — covering text generation, structured output, tool calling, streaming, vector database (RAG) integration, and agentic workflows. The framework includes a CLI and Developer UI for rapid local iteration, and supports deployment to Cloud Functions for Firebase, Google Cloud Ru

items.title: What's new with Google Data Cloud | Google Cloud Blog
items.author: cloud.google.com
items.snippet: Google Cloud has been actively releasing major Gemini AI updates in early 2026. Key announcements include Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite, described as the fastest and most cost-efficient model in the Gemini 3 series, designed for high-volume developer workloads and rolling out via Vertex AI and Google AI Studio. Gemma 4, built from the same research as Gemini 3, was released on April 2, 2026, featuring 256K context windows, native vision and audio processing, and support for over 140 languages. The Gemin

items.title: Gemini CLI by Google - Release Notes - April 2026 Latest Updates - Releasebot
items.author: releasebot.io
items.snippet: The google-gemini GitHub organization has been actively releasing updates across multiple repositories in early 2026. The most active repository is google-gemini/gemini-cli, which shipped several patch releases in April 2026 — versions 0.38.2 (April 17), 0.38.1 (April 16), and 0.37.1–0.37.2 (April 15). The CLI also had release notes updated in January 2026 and has been iterating rapidly on developer tooling. A notable service update discussion around abuse mitigation and traffic prioritization i

items.snippet: Genkit is an open-source AI framework built and maintained by Google, available for JavaScript/TypeScript, Go, and Python (alpha). It provides a unified, code-centric API for building production-ready AI-powered applications — covering text generation, structured output, tool calling, streaming, vector database (RAG) integration, and agentic workflows. The framework includes a CLI and Developer UI for rapid local iteration, and supports deployment to Cloud Functions for Firebase, Google Cloud Ru

items.title: What Is Firebase Studio? Full Stack AI Coding Tutorial - YouTube
items.author: www.youtube.com
items.snippet: Firebase Studio was Google's agentic cloud-based IDE that unified Project IDX with Gemini AI assistance, allowing developers to build full-stack apps — including games — using natural language prompts and multimodal inputs without writing code. Its App Prototyping agent (Prototyper) let users describe app ideas, iterate on UI and API design, and deploy directly to Firebase App Hosting. For game development specifically, Firebase backed mobile games via C++ and Unity SDKs, and Firebase AI Logic e

items.title: The Gemini App is now available on Mac OS
items.author: blog.google
items.snippet: Google has been rapidly advancing its Gemini AI platform throughout early 2026. The flagship release is Gemini 3.1 Pro, announced in mid-April 2026, which began rolling out in the Gemini app with improved reasoning and higher performance on complex problem-solving benchmarks. It is available via the Gemini API, Vertex AI, the Gemini app, and NotebookLM (for Pro/Ultra subscribers). Earlier in February, Google also released the Gemini 3 Deep Think upgrade, developed in collaboration with world-cla

items.title: Customizations Panel Empty + no workspaces found Error After 1.20.3 Update - Google AI Developers Forum
items.author: discuss.ai.google.dev
items.snippet: Google Antigravity, Google's agentic development platform integrated with AI Studio, continues to receive updates in early 2026. The platform combines an AI-powered coding experience with an agent-first interface that can autonomously plan, execute, and verify complex tasks across your editor, terminal, and browser. The latest Antigravity update (1.20.3, released March 5, 2026) added support for reading rules from AGENTS.md in addition to GEMINI.md, and deprecated the manual Auto-continue settin
